title: Group
description: A group registrant in OpenSPP (e.g. a household). Backed by the Odoo model `res.partner` where `is_registrant=true` and `is_group=true`. Returned by `getGroup` / `searchGroup`.

spp_id.description: OpenSPP public identifier for the group, prefixed with `GRP_` (e.g. `GRP_Q4VGGZPF`).

address.description: Postal address. Odoo returns `false` when unset.

phone.description: Primary phone number. Odoo returns `false` when unset.

kind.description: Many2one reference `[id, name]` to `g2p.group.kind` (household, family, etc.). `false` when unset.
